  • Method

Interface JavaParserVisitor<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The return type of the visit operation. Use Void for operations with no return type.
All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
JavaParserBaseVisitor
public interface JavaParserVisitor<T> extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
This interface defines a complete generic visitor for a parse tree produced by JavaParser.

  • Method Summary

    visit, visitChildren, visitErrorNode, visitTerminal
